bug_report.summary: Typing into Password field auto-reveals password (masked bullets switch to plaintext) and toggles the reveal icon without user action
steps_to_reproduce: Type a password (e.g., S3cure-Passw0rd#1) without clicking the eye/reveal button.
expected_behaviors: Password characters remain masked while typing unless the user explicitly clicks the reveal (eye) control.
The eye icon state should not toggle due to typing/focus alone.
actual_behaviors: After typing, the password is displayed as plaintext in the Password field.
The reveal control icon toggles (eye -> eye-with-slash) even though the reveal button was not clicked.

bug_report.summary: Password reveal control shows different default icon/state on Create New Login form after refactor
steps_to_reproduce: Open Firefox and navigate to about:logins.
Observe the password reveal (eye) control next to the Password field before interacting with it (no show/hide toggles yet).
expected_behaviors: The password reveal control should display the same default icon/state as before the change (consistent initial show/hide affordance when the password is masked by default).
actual_behaviors: The password reveal control’s icon/state is different after the change (eye icon appears in a different state, e.g., slashed vs unslashed), even though the password field is still empty and no reveal action has been performed.
